problem_text_cn: 3-9 大质量车厢在水平地面上以$v_0$速度匀速行驶，车厢内有一半径$R$的光滑半圆柱面，顶部有一质量为$m$的小球，开始时小球静止，而后因微小扰动下滑离开圆柱面，试求过程中圆柱面支持力$N$对小球所作功。
problem_text_en: 3-9 A large‑mass carriage moves at constant speed $v_0$ on a horizontal ground. Inside the carriage there is a smooth semi‑cylindrical surface of radius $R$, and a small ball of mass $m$ rests at the top. Initially the ball is stationary; it then slides down due to a slight disturbance and leaves the cylindrical surface. Find the work done by the normal force $N$ of the cylindrical surface on the ball during the process.
problem_solution_cn:
解 车厢系(惯性系)中，小球右滑或左滑离开圆柱面的方位角如图3-11所示，应有

$$ mg\cos\phi=\frac{m u^{\prime 2}}{R}, $$

$$ \frac{1}{2} m u^{\prime 2}=m g R(1-\cos\phi), $$

可解得

$$ \cos\phi=\frac{2}{3},\quad u^{\prime}=\sqrt{\frac{2}{3} gR}. $$

地面系中，小球初速$u_0=v_0$，右滑或左滑离开圆柱面时的速度$u$可分解为水平$x$方向和竖直$y$方向分量，各为

$$ u_x=v_0\pm u^{\prime}\cos\phi,\quad u_y=u^{\prime}\sin\phi. $$

过程中圆柱面支持力$N$对小球作功

$$ W=\frac{1}{2} m\left(u_x^{2}+u_y^{2}\right)-\left[m g R(1-\cos\phi)+\frac{1}{2} m v_0^{2}\right], $$

可算得为

$$ W=\pm\frac{2}{3} m v_0\sqrt{\frac{2}{3} gR},\quad\begin{cases}+:\text{右行滑离},\\ -:\text{左行滑离}.\end{cases} $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution In the carriage frame (an inertial frame), let the azimuth angle at which the ball leaves the cylindrical surface (sliding to the right or left) be as shown in Figure 3-11. We have

$$ mg\cos\phi=\frac{m u^{\prime 2}}{R}, $$

$$ \frac{1}{2} m u^{\prime 2}=m g R(1-\cos\phi), $$

which yield

$$ \cos\phi=\frac{2}{3},\quad u^{\prime}=\sqrt{\frac{2}{3} gR}. $$

In the ground frame, the initial speed of the ball is $u_0=v_0$. The velocity $u$ when the ball leaves the surface (sliding to the right or left) can be decomposed into horizontal ($x$) and vertical ($y$) components:

$$ u_x=v_0\pm u^{\prime}\cos\phi,\quad u_y=u^{\prime}\sin\phi. $$

The work done by the normal force $N$ on the ball during the process is

$$ W=\frac{1}{2} m\left(u_x^{2}+u_y^{2}\right)-\left[m g R(1-\cos\phi)+\frac{1}{2} m v_0^{2}\right], $$

which can be calculated as

$$ W=\pm\frac{2}{3} m v_0\sqrt{\frac{2}{3} gR},\quad\begin{cases}+:\text{sliding to the right},\\ -:\text{sliding to the left}.\end{cases} $$

 Figure 3-11 shows the force analysis of the small ball sliding on the semi‑cylindrical surface.
problem_answer: 右行滑离时，$W=+\dfrac{2}{3} m v_0\sqrt{\dfrac{2}{3} gR}$；左行滑离时，$W=-\dfrac{2}{3} m v_0\sqrt{\dfrac{2}{3} gR}$。
